title: Add subitem in a calendar dashboard
excerpt: Today Monday allow us to add a new item through a calendar dashboard, but it would be great to be able to add also subitems.

posts.author: SilviaSa (Silvia Assumpção Soares de Sá)
posts.cookedHtml: Today Monday allow us to add a new item through a calendar dashboard, but it would be great to be able to add also subitems.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
There is a similar request for this feature here - Sub Item Time Tracking Widget - #42 by Julietteb

You can cast your vote and share your thoughts on this thread as well for our team to see.
